metadata.name: NovaTrek Adventures Organizational Architecture Standard
metadata.description: Organizational extensions to the CALM node schema, defining required metadata fields for all NovaTrek architecture components. This standard ensures every service, database, and actor node carries sufficient context for governance automation, team routing, and portal generation.
references: architecture/metadata/actors.yaml — Actor and frontend app registry

service-node.description: Required metadata fields for every service node in the NovaTrek CALM topology

fields.description: The bounded context domain this service belongs to. Must match a domain key in architecture/metadata/domains.yaml.
The owning team responsible for this service. Used for PR routing and incident escalation.
Sensitivity classification for data handled by this service.
True if this service is in the PCI DSS cardholder data environment. Triggers additional governance controls.

database-node.description: Required metadata fields for every database node in the NovaTrek CALM topology

fields.description: Database engine and version. Must match the entry in architecture/metadata/data-stores.yaml.
List of primary table or collection names owned by this database.
The bounded context domain this database belongs to. Must match the owning service domain.

actor-node.description: Required metadata fields for human actor nodes

fields.description: Primary domain association for this actor.

governance-rules.name: Single Database Ownership
governance-rules.description: Each service owns exactly one database. No service may share a database with another service.

governance-rules.name: API-Mediated Cross-Service Access
governance-rules.description: Services must communicate through published API endpoints. No direct database access between services.

governance-rules.name: Domain Metadata Required
governance-rules.description: Every service node must declare its domain and owning team.

governance-rules.name: PCI Scope Declaration
governance-rules.description: Services in the cardholder data environment must declare pci-in-scope: true in metadata.

governance-rules.name: Pattern 3 Safety Default
governance-rules.description: Unknown or unmapped adventure categories must default to Pattern 3 (Full Service check-in). Never default to Pattern 1.

governance-rules.name: Event Schema Required
governance-rules.description: Every Kafka event published by a service must have a corresponding AsyncAPI spec entry.
